title: Violent vs. Compassionate Communication
subtitle: Communication Strategy Framework | 2024

paragraphs: Developed a comprehensive communication strategy framework based on the 'violent vs. compassionate communication' model. Designed for personal brand positioning and CSR initiatives, demonstrating strategic thinking around communication psychology and its practical application in business and social contexts.
bullets: Identified and contrasted violent communication styles (judgmental, dismissive, coercive) vs. compassionate styles (empathetic, curious, constructive)
Mapped trigger points and escalation patterns in communication breakdowns
Designed response frameworks that build empathy and avoid escalation
Created scenario-based guides applicable to customer service, team management, and public relations
Developed training material outline for organizational communication improvement

design.typography: Clean sans-serif; contrasting colors for the two styles

summary: Communication strategy framework contrasting violent vs. compassionate communication styles — identifying triggers, escalation patterns, and building empathy-based response frameworks for professional application.
